title: Entity Instance Schema
description: Unified placed entity instance for dungeon maps. Canonical runtime list for creatures, items, and obstacles. This is the primary data structure for all placed entities in dungeon levels at runtime, providing a consistent interface for entity lifecycle management (spawn, move, despawn) and mutable state tracking.

entity_instance_id.description: Unique identifier for this placed instance.

entity_ref.description: Reference to the base entity definition in the content registry. Links this instance to its template (creature, item, trap, hazard, or obstacle).

content_type.description: Registry content type this instance points to.

version.description: Optional version pin for deterministic replay. Must follow semantic versioning (e.g., '1.0.0') if specified.

placement.description: Physical placement information for this entity instance in the dungeon. Specifies which room and hex coordinate the entity occupies.

hex.description: Axial hex coordinates for entity placement in the dungeon map.

q.description: Column coordinate in axial hex system (q-axis).

r.description: Row coordinate in axial hex system (r-axis).

elevation.description: Vertical elevation offset in game units (0 = ground level). Used for flying creatures, elevated platforms, pits, etc.

facing.description: Direction the entity is facing (0-5 for hexagonal directions: 0=E, 1=NE, 2=NW, 3=W, 4=SW, 5=SE). Used for vision cones, facing-dependent mechanics, and rendering.

spawn_type.description: Spawn behavior metadata. For creatures: respawn mechanics. For items: collection behavior. For obstacles: trigger behavior. Null for default behavior.

state.description: Mutable runtime state overlay for this instance. Tracks lifecycle flags, combat state (hit points), inventory, and extensible metadata.

active.description: Whether the entity is currently active in the game world.

destroyed.description: Whether the entity has been destroyed (e.g., creature killed, item consumed, obstacle demolished).

disabled.description: Whether the entity is temporarily disabled (e.g., trap disarmed, hazard deactivated).

hidden.description: Whether the entity is hidden from view (e.g., stealthy creature, concealed trap).

collected.description: Whether the item has been collected by a party member. Primarily for entity_type=item.

hit_points.description: Current and maximum hit points. Primarily for entity_type=creature.

inventory.description: Inventory item refs carried by this instance (typically creatures). Each item references content from the item registry.

metadata.description: Extensible metadata storage for entity-specific runtime data. Can store any additional properties not covered by the standard schema. Common keys: patrol_pattern, aggression_level, detected, triggered_count, perception_dc, loot_quality, discovered_by.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entity instance was created/spawned.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entity instance was last modified.

inventory_item.description: Reference to an item in the item registry with quantity information.

content_id.description: Registry content_id for the carried item.

quantity.description: Number of items in this stack.

version.description: Optional version pin for deterministic replay, similar to entity_ref.version. If present, overrides entity_ref.version for this inventory item in replay scenarios.
